app-counter-desc: A simple, elegant tally counter for everyday use.
app-watersort-desc: Sort colorful liquids into matching tubes in this relaxing puzzle game.
app-tarot-desc: Draw tarot cards and explore their meanings for daily guidance.
counter-full-desc: A clean, distraction-free counter app designed for daily use — whether you're counting inventory, gym reps, or anything else that matters.
watersort-full-desc: Pour colored liquids between tubes until each tube contains only one color. A calming puzzle game with hundreds of levels to enjoy at your own pace.
watersort-feature-2: No time pressure — play at your own pace
tarot-full-desc: Draw tarot cards daily and explore their rich symbolism and meanings. A digital companion for reflection, journaling, and spiritual curiosity.
